name: Zinc gluconate
description: Zinc gluconate is a zinc salt of gluconic acid composed of two gluconic acid molecules for each zinc cation (2+). Zinc gluconate is considered a generally recognized as safe (GRAS) substance by FDA. It is available as a trace mineral supplement and lozenges for reduced duration of common cold and severity in symptoms. Although it has been nasally administered for the common cold, this route of administration has been associated with some cases of anosmia.
